feedback.text: I would like for the EU to take into account the practice of game/software publishers removing access from bought digital products, while being unclear/misleading on their ability to remove such access. At the moment, access from games/software products can often times be removed, while at the time of purchase, it was unclear whether you own the (digital) product and/or when or how or if the publishers are able to remove access to the (digital) product. This practice is misleading and unfair for consumers who think they are buying a product, only for access to the product being removed later on.
